name: milystudio
description: MilyStudio — local media editor monorepo (apps + services + packages)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c magenta,cyan "npm --prefix apps/studio-server run dev" "npm --prefix apps/studio-web run dev"
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix apps/studio-web run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/studio-server run typecheck
scripts.install:all: npm install --no-workspaces && npm --prefix apps/studio-server install && npm --prefix apps/studio-web install
